title: Refunds and Returns Policy
text: Customers may request a return within **14 calendar days** of receiving an order. The item must be unused, in its original condition, and returned with all included accessories and packaging. Proof of purchase or the order number is required.

title: Refunds and Returns Policy
text: Digital products, personalized products, opened hygiene-sensitive items, and gift cards are not eligible for return unless they are defective or were delivered incorrectly.

title: Refunds and Returns Policy
text:
1. Submit a return request through the customer support portal.
2. Provide the order number and the reason for the return.
3. Wait for the return authorization and shipping instructions.
4. Send the item using the approved return method.

title: Refunds and Returns Policy
text: After the returned item is received and inspected, approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within **5–7 business days**. Bank processing may require an additional **2–5 business days**.

title: Refunds and Returns Policy
text: If the return is caused by a defective, damaged, or incorrect item, NovaStore covers the return shipping cost. For change-of-mind returns, the customer is responsible for return shipping.

title: Refunds and Returns Policy
text: Contact a human support agent if the refund has not appeared within **10 business days** after approval.

title: Shipping and Delivery Policy
text: Orders are normally processed within **1–2 business days** after payment confirmation. Orders placed on weekends or public holidays are processed on the next business day.

title: Shipping and Delivery Policy
text:
- Standard delivery: **3–7 business days**
- Express delivery: **1–3 business days**
- Remote-area delivery: may require an additional **2–4 business days**

Delivery times are estimates and may be affected by weather, carrier delays, customs checks, or incorrect address details.

title: Shipping and Delivery Policy
text: Customers may request an address change only before the order status changes to **Shipped**. Once the package has been handed to the carrier, the address cannot be changed by NovaStore.

title: Shipping and Delivery Policy
text: A package is considered delayed when it has not arrived **2 business days** after the estimated delivery date. Customers should first check the tracking page. If there is no movement for **48 hours**, customer support can open a carrier investigation.

title: Shipping and Delivery Policy
text: The carrier may mark the order as delivered before the package is physically received. Customers should allow up to **24 hours**, check nearby locations, and ask household members or building reception before reporting the package as missing.

title: Order Cancellation Policy
section: When an order can be cancelled
text: An order can be cancelled while its status is **Pending** or **Processing**. Cancellation is no longer guaranteed after the order status changes to **Packed** or **Shipped**.

title: Order Cancellation Policy
text: Customers can request cancellation from the My Orders page or by contacting customer support with the order number. A cancellation request is not complete until the customer receives a confirmation message.

title: Order Cancellation Policy
text:
For successfully cancelled orders:
- Card payments are reversed within **3–7 business days**.
- Digital-wallet payments are usually reversed within **1–3 business days**.
- Bank processing times may vary.

title: Order Cancellation Policy
text: If only part of an order has shipped, the unshipped items may still be cancelled. Shipped items must follow the standard return process after delivery.

title: Order Cancellation Policy
text: If cancellation is not possible because the order has already shipped, the customer may refuse delivery where permitted or request a return after receiving the order.

title: Order Cancellation Policy
text: A human agent should review cases involving duplicate orders, suspected fraud, or cancellation requests submitted before shipment but not processed correctly.

title: Payments and Billing Policy
text: NovaStore accepts major debit and credit cards, supported digital wallets, and approved local payment methods displayed during checkout.

title: Payments and Billing Policy
text: A temporary authorization hold may appear when an order is placed. The final charge is completed after the order is confirmed. If an order fails or is cancelled, the hold may remain visible for **3–7 business days**, depending on the bank.

title: Payments and Billing Policy
text:
Payments may be declined because of:
- Incorrect card information
- Insufficient funds
- Bank security restrictions
- Expired cards
- Billing-address mismatch

Customers should verify their details and contact their bank before retrying repeatedly.

title: Payments and Billing Policy
text: A pending authorization and a completed charge may look like duplicate charges. Customers should wait up to **48 hours** for pending entries to disappear. If two completed charges remain, support will investigate after receiving the order number, payment date, and last four digits of the payment method.

title: Payments and Billing Policy
text: Invoices become available after payment confirmation and can be downloaded from the My Orders page. Invoice details cannot normally be changed after the invoice is issued unless required by law.

title: Account Access and Password Recovery
text: Customers can reset a password by selecting **Forgot Password** on the sign-in page. A verification link is sent to the registered email address. The link expires after **15 minutes** and can be used only once.

title: Account Access and Password Recovery
text:
Customers should:
1. Check spam or junk folders.
2. Confirm that the email address was entered correctly.
3. Wait up to **5 minutes**.
4. Request one additional reset email.

Repeated requests may invalidate earlier links.

title: Account Access and Password Recovery
text: An account may be temporarily locked after several unsuccessful sign-in attempts. The lock is normally removed after **30 minutes**. Customers should avoid repeated attempts during the lock period.

title: Account Access and Password Recovery
text: Changes to registered contact details require identity verification. Support agents must not ask customers to provide full passwords, complete card numbers, or one-time verification codes.

title: Account Access and Password Recovery
text: If unauthorized access is suspected, the customer should reset the password immediately, review recent orders, and contact support. The case should be escalated to the security team if an unknown order or account change is found.

title: Damaged, Incorrect, or Missing Items Policy
text: Customers should report a damaged, incorrect, or missing item within **48 hours** of delivery.

title: Damaged, Incorrect, or Missing Items Policy
text:
The customer should provide:
- Order number
- Description of the issue
- Clear photos of the item and packaging
- Photo of the shipping label when available

title: Damaged, Incorrect, or Missing Items Policy
text: After verification, NovaStore may offer a replacement, refund, or store credit. The customer should keep the item and packaging until support provides instructions.

title: Damaged, Incorrect, or Missing Items Policy
text: If the wrong product was delivered, NovaStore provides return instructions and covers reasonable return shipping. A replacement is sent after the issue is confirmed, subject to stock availability.

title: Damaged, Incorrect, or Missing Items Policy
text: For multi-item orders, customers should check whether the order was split into multiple shipments. If the package is marked delivered but is missing, the customer should check nearby locations and wait up to **24 hours** before reporting it.

title: Damaged, Incorrect, or Missing Items Policy
text: Cases involving high-value items, repeated delivery claims, or suspected package tampering must be escalated for manual review.

title: Order Tracking and Status Guide
text:
- **Pending:** Payment or order verification is incomplete.
- **Processing:** Payment is confirmed and the order is being prepared.
- **Packed:** The package is ready for carrier pickup.
- **Shipped:** The carrier has received the package.
- **Out for Delivery:** Delivery is expected that day.
- **Delivered:** The carrier recorded delivery.
- **Cancelled:** The order will not be shipped.
- **Returned:** The package was received back by NovaStore.

title: Order Tracking and Status Guide
text: Tracking information is usually available within **24 hours** after the status changes to Shipped. A tracking number may show no movement until the carrier performs the first scan.

title: Order Tracking and Status Guide
text: If tracking has not changed for **48 hours**, the customer may contact support. Support can open a carrier investigation if the shipment is beyond the estimated delivery period.

title: Order Tracking and Status Guide
text: Items from the same order may be shipped separately. Each shipment may have a different tracking number and delivery date.

title: Customer Support Escalation and Response Policy
text: The automated assistant may answer general questions about orders, shipping, returns, payments, account access, and published company policies.

title: Customer Support Escalation and Response Policy
section: When to escalate to a human agent
text:
Escalation is required when:
- The customer reports fraud or unauthorized activity.
- The request involves a high-value order.
- The customer disputes a previous decision.
- The issue cannot be resolved using the knowledge base.
- The customer has contacted support more than twice about the same unresolved issue.
- Personal identity verification is required.
- The customer explicitly asks to speak with a human agent.

title: Customer Support Escalation and Response Policy
text:
- General questions: immediate automated response
- Standard agent cases: within **4 business hours**
- Urgent security or fraud cases: within **1 business hour**
- Carrier investigations: initial update within **2 business days**

title: Customer Support Escalation and Response Policy
text: Agents and automated systems must not request full passwords, complete payment-card numbers, or one-time verification codes. Sensitive customer data must be masked in logs and excluded from the vector database.

title: Customer Support Escalation and Response Policy
text: If the retrieved information is incomplete, conflicting, or outdated, the assistant must state that it cannot confirm the answer and escalate instead of guessing.
